chapter_title: Eligibility to enrol in a Victorian government school
snippet: To enrol in a Victorian government school, an applicant must: . Refer to: International Student Program (ISP) meet the age eligibility requirements set out in these Guidelines (based on the requirements set out in the Education and Training Reform Act (2006) and Education and Training Reform Regulations 2017 (Vic). For information on school age requirements, including exceptions and exemptions, see the chapter in these guidelines on School age requirements . Overview of enrolment in Victorian gover...
